channel.title: solid-liquid equilibria; solvation; cobalt nitrate; nickel nitrate;mixed oxides precursors on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in solid-liquid equilibria; solvation; cobalt nitrate; nickel nitrate;mixed oxides precursors on LMI

item.title: Solvation Phenomena And Revision Of Solid-Liquid Equilibria In Aqueoussolutions Of Two Precursors Of Mixed Oxides, The Hydrates Of Cobalt Andnickel Nitrates
